calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brendan Brewer for Tommie Barnett, Petitioner/Executor.

Discussion was held regarding the Examiner's notes. The court noted the complexity of resolving the estate, particularly regarding real property listed in the inventory and prior issues with creditor's claims. The court discussed the recommendation for filing a 10361.5 petition rather than proceeding under a 12251 petition to terminate for lack of assets. Counsel explained that attempts to sell the property to cover debt were unsuccessful, and no compromise was reached with the lienholder.

The court opted to treat the petition as a petition for final distribution of an insolvent estate on waiver of accounting and took the matter under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR
A Petition For Final Distribution (Or To Terminate The Estate For Lack Of Assets) Or A Second Report Of Status Must Be Filed At Least Two Weeks Before 9/30/24.

Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Continued To Feb-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Brendan P. Brewer, Esq. for Tommie Barnett also appearing via Zoom.

Mr. Brewer confirmed that the date of death of Gregory Barnett as July 31, 2019, and the date of death of Terry Barnett as May 28, 2007.

This matter was put on for hearing for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated 7/27/22 is admitted to probate. Tommie Barnett is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open court. Status on close of estate is set for January 31, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: H. Singh. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
